ip_outcome_note: Card name is 'Mallow & Lana'; depicted figures (one in green, one in blue, tropical outdoor setting) match canonical character designs for Mallow (Grass-type Trial Captain, green attire) and Lana (Water-type Trial Captain, blue attire) from Pokemon Sun and Moon. Verified via card name and Bulbapedia character pages.

trivia_bullets.text: Mallow and Lana are both Trial Captains stationed on Akala Island in Pokemon Sun and Moon. Mallow oversees the Lush Jungle Grass-type trial (Totem: Lurantis) and Lana oversees the Brooklet Hill Water-type trial (Totem: Wishiwashi). They are close friends alongside Kiawe, the Akala Fire-type captain. [Bulbapedia: Mallow; Bulbapedia: Lana; via WebSearch]

The card switches the player's Active Pokemon with a Benched Pokemon; if 2 cards are discarded from hand, also heals 120 damage from the Pokemon moved to the Bench. The switch+heal combination mirrors the in-game thematic pairing: Mallow's restorative ingredient-gathering and Lana's Brooklet Hill healing waters. [Pokemon.com TCG card database]

Cosmic Eclipse (SM12) was the final Sun & Moon expansion (released November 1, 2019) and the set that introduced TAG TEAM Supporter cards. Mallow & Lana is one of several TAG TEAM Supporter pairings debuting in this expansion. [Pokemon.com press release; WebSearch]

Artist: Ken Sugimori. The color-coded pairing (green for Mallow, blue for Lana) directly mirrors their in-game type affinities (Grass and Water), making the art a visual type-chart shorthand for the two trial captains. [PokemonTCG.io frontmatter; Bulbapedia: Trial Captain, via WebSearch]
